name: extension-surface-guard
trigger: When proposing or modifying extension and client-side behavior.
warns_on: UI state is treated as canonical truth
blocks_on: client tries to compute authoritative gate outcomes
remediation: Move policy back into the authority pack and keep the surface as display and relay.
limitations: Only useful if extension proposals are actually routed through the pack.
fallback_behavior: Use `docs/jack/extension-boundaries.md` as the manual review checklist.
